generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a senior citizen who remembers the Cold War, I'm deeply concerned about our alliance commitments. While I support our allies, we can't ignore the fact that many aren't pulling their weight. Did you know that only 3 of our 28 NATO allies meet the 2% defense spending target? Meanwhile, our own budget is stretched thin. We need to prioritize our own security first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitments
